purpose: Measure whether H22 and the existing v357 shadow remain genuinely diversifying in fully prospective evidence after the frozen 50/50 historical combination failed its drawdown gates.
observation_start: No evidence before the H22 registration at 2026-06-26T16:12:35Z may be counted.

data_rules.h22: Use only closed fully prospective daily aggregate observations from its independent forward ledger.
data_rules.v357: Use only non-warmup closed fully prospective trades from its independent SQLite-derived forward ledger, normalized using the already frozen 0.5 percent portfolio-risk convention and aggregated by UTC day.
data_rules.common_day_definition: A UTC day beginning at 04:00 UTC after H22 registration. A component with no closed return on a day contributes zero for correlation observation, but missing or unhealthy data days are excluded rather than filled.
data_rules.costs: Use each component's existing base and stress forward cost definitions without modification.

statistics_only: base and stress daily Pearson correlation
base and stress daily Spearman rank correlation
fraction of days both components lose
fraction of each component loss days shared by the other component
fraction of days both components are below their own running equity peak
top five joint-loss days share of total joint losses

review_conditions.minimum_data_quality: all source integrity and snapshot-chain checks pass

not_allowed: compute or select a portfolio weight
